title: Humans as Animals

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two switches
record:
"next" on one switch 
"speak!" on the other

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Hold up each animal picture and say what's on the card, e.g. "lion".
2. If the switch user presses "next", put the picture down and show the next one.
3. If the switch user presses "say it!", make the animal sound for the picture you are holding, e.g. "quack quack!"

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to scan through pictures of animals and choose which animal the other player must impersonate e.g choosing a cow the player must say "moo"
